**Whirlpool** slashed its earnings forecast and raised prices by **10%**, blaming the Iran war and tariff uncertainty for 'recession-level' demand slumps.
**Maersk CEO** said reopening the Strait of Hormuz would have 'limited impact' on cargo flows now that rerouting has become the industry's new normal.
**BP** is selling stakes in its flagship carbon capture projects in north-east England as it accelerates its retreat from its own green commitments.

**David Attenborough** turns 100 today - the only public figure who makes everyone, across every political tribe, feel briefly better about Britain.
**Great Western Railway** will be nationalised in December, becoming the 11th operator returned to public ownership since Labour won in 2024.
**British Airways** fares are rising after parent IAG flagged a **1.7 billion pound fuel cost hit** from the Iran war this year.
**Toyota** reported a **3 billion pound profit hit** from the Iran war as materials costs soared and global car sales fell.
**Meta** is suing Ofcom in the High Court over fines calculated on global rather than UK revenue under the Online Safety Act - a fight that could reshape how big tech is regulated across Europe.

**One Nation** won its first Australian lower-house seat in a by-election, marking a breakthrough for Pauline Hanson's far-right party after decades at the fringes.
A **Frontier Airlines** Airbus A321 struck and killed a pedestrian on the runway at Denver International Airport after pilots aborted takeoff due to a cabin smoke alarm.

**Germany** is pushing to buy US Tomahawk cruise missiles despite a fresh falling-out between Chancellor Friedrich Merz and Trump, underscoring how European defence needs are overriding diplomatic friction.
**Amazon** completed its first UK drone delivery, a small but symbolic step toward commercial parcel delivery by air in British suburbs.
**Intel's** stock has risen **490%** in the past year on turnaround hopes - a Wall Street bet that most analysts privately think is running well ahead of the company's actual recovery.
